Now I'll create a comprehensive packing list for your Hawaii vacation based on your itinerary and the partial list I found. I'll include items for all the planned activities and create a new file with this information.

args.content:
# Hawaii Vacation Packing List

## Essentials
- Travel documents (passport, ID, boarding passes)
- Credit cards and cash
- Phone and charger
- Medications
- Travel insurance information

## Clothing
- Swimwear (2-3 sets)
- Beach cover-ups
- Sun hat
- Sunglasses
- Casual outfits (t-shirts, shorts, sundresses)
- Light jacket or sweater (for cooler evenings)
- Sleepwear
- Undergarments and socks
- Flip-flops/sandals
- Walking shoes
- Hiking shoes/boots

## Beach & Water Activities
- Reef-safe sunscreen (SPF 30 or higher)
- After-sun lotion (aloe vera)
- Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins)
- Beach towel/quick-dry towel
- Waterproof phone case
- Dry bag
- Water shoes
- Rash guard/swim shirt

## Hiking & Outdoor Activities
- Hiking gear (backpack, water bottle)
- Insect repellent
- First aid kit
- Flashlight/headlamp
- Multi-tool

## Electronics
- Camera with extra batteries/memory cards
- Phone and charger
- Portable power bank
- Travel adapter (if needed)
- Headphones

## Toiletries
- Toothbrush and toothpaste
- Shampoo and conditioner
- Body wash
- Deodorant
- Razor and shaving supplies
- Hair styling tools
- Makeup and remover
- Feminine hygiene products
- Hairbrush/comb

## Activity-Specific Items
- For Diamond Head hike: Sturdy hiking shoes, water bottle, hat
- For snorkeling at Hanauma Bay: Reef-safe sunscreen, snorkeling gear
- For luau at Polynesian Cultural Center: Casual Hawaiian attire
- For spa day: Swimsuit, flip-flops
- For kayaking at Kailua Beach: Water shoes, waterproof bag for valuables

## Miscellaneous
- Books or e-reader
- Travel journal
- Snacks for travel days
- Reusable water bottle
- Ziplock bags (various sizes)
- Laundry bag

Have a wonderful vacation in Hawaii! 🌺
